---
title: "JJM Assessment Documents"
---

# Overview

This site collects the main Quarto documents in the `assessment/` directory and renders them for direct browsing through GitHub Pages.

The current published documents are:

1. [JM-WP-BM-01](JM-WP-BM-01.qmd)
2. [Helper Scripts Guide](helper_scripts_guide.qmd)

# Document Guide

## JM-WP-BM-01

This is the main benchmark working-paper draft currently tracked as `JM-WP-BM-01.qmd`.

## Helper Scripts Guide

This guide documents the reusable helper scripts added for:

- creating the reduced `2.00` data file
- creating the matching `h1_2.00` control file
- running standard JJM fits
- running short `adnuts` MCMC benchmarks

# Notes

The website is rendered from the `assessment/` directory into the repository `docs/` folder so it can be served by GitHub Pages in the standard way.
